title: Tiernvael Mountains
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Tiernvael Mountains''' were a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] range overlooking the [[Meditative Canyon]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

{{Loc-stub}}
